revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三和神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 栃木県那須郡那珂川町三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}} |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主命]] |社格 = [[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]]、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = 流造銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[10月30日]] |神事 = }}
'''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町 (栃木県)|那珂川町]]にある[[神社]]。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡'''三和神社'''に比定されている<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，41頁</ref>。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は郷社<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。[[大物主|大物主命]]を祀る<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。
== 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。[[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる<ref>『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁</ref>。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。
当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている<ref>{{Cite web|author=那珂川町|url=http://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/22kankou_04kategory/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-8-30}}</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6
{{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 三和神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=栃木県}} |所在地 = 栃木県那須郡那珂川町三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}} |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主命]] |社格 = [[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]]、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = 流造銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[10月30日]] |神事 = }}
'''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町 (栃木県)|那珂川町]]にある[[神社]]。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡'''三和神社'''に比定されている<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，41頁</ref>。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は郷社<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。[[大物主|大物主命]]を祀る<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。
== 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。[[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる<ref>『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁</ref>。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている<ref>『栃木県神社誌』，898頁</ref>。
当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている<ref>{{Cite web|author=那珂川町|url=http://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/22kankou_04kategory/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-8-30}}</ref>。

== 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6

{{神社 |名称 = 三和神社 |画像 = [[File:TchigikenNasugun-Miwajinja-01.jpg|207px|栃木県　三和神社　拝殿]] |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主命]] |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == 祭神 == * [[大物主|大物主命]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|author=那珂川町|url=http://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/22kankou_04kategory/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-8-30}}。 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ** 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 三和神社 |画像 = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主命]] |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == 祭神 == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|author=那珂川町|url=http://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/22kankou_04kategory/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-8-30}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ** 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

拝殿 |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主命]] |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == 祭神 == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ** 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

{{神社 |name = 三和神社 |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |deity = [[大物主|大物主命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == deity == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ** 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed:みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]][[Category:Pages needing attribution]]

{{神社 |name = 三和神社 |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |deity = [[大物主|大物主命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == deity == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ** 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]]

{{神社 |name = 三和神社 |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |location = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |deity = [[大物主|大物主命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |location map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == deity == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == History == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ''' 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:null category]][[Category:new pages most likely untranslated or similar]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:null category]][[Category:new pages most likely untranslated or similar]]

旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |location map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == deity == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == History == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == Cultural Properties == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ''' 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:null category]][[Category:new pages most likely untranslated or similar]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:null category]][[Category:new pages most likely untranslated or similar]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}}

1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:null category]][[Category:new pages most likely untranslated or similar]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:null category]][[Category:new pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}}

旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |location map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == deity == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == History == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == Cultural Properties == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ''' 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:Unsorted_completion_categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:New pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:Unsorted_completion_categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}}

1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:三和神社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:untranslated shrines and temples]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:New pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:Qq-1月4日 (旧暦)-qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:untranslated shrines and temples]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:qq]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}}

1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三和神社]][[Category:11]] [[ja:三和神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:11-1月4日 (旧暦)-11]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:untranslated shrines and temples]] [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:New pages most likely untranslated or similar]] [[Category:11-1月4日 (旧暦)-11]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:untranslated shrines and temples]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:11]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}}

{{Shinto shrine |name = Miwa Shrine |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|ja|神道}} |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町}} Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命}} |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}}, and its former shrine ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇}} ({{ill|604|ja|604}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gosha of Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:Mass Imported Shinto Cult Pages]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[ja:三和神社]]

The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}}, and its former shrine ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇}} ({{ill|604|ja|604}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - revision.text:
{{Shinto shrine |name = Miwa Shrine |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|ja|神道|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|12=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|12=draft}} Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|12=draft}} |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|12=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|12=draft}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|12=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|12=draft}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}}, and its former shrine ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|12=draft}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|12=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|12=draft}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|12=draft}} ({{ill|604|ja|604|12=draft}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|12=draft}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社|12=draft}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国|12=draft}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|12=draft}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|12=draft}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|12=draft}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|12=draft}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|12=draft}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|12=draft}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|12=draft}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|12=draft}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gosha of Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:Mass Imported Shinto Cult Pages]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category: tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]]

Haiden |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|ja|神道|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|12=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|12=draft}} Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|12=draft}} |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|12=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|12=draft}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|12=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|12=draft}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=draft}}, and its former shrine ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|12=draft}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|12=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|12=draft}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|12=draft}} ({{ill|604|ja|604|12=draft}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|12=draft}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社|12=draft}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国|12=draft}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|12=draft}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|12=draft}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|12=draft}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|12=draft}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|12=draft}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|12=draft}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|12=draft}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|12=draft}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{citation needed|みわしんしや}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gosha of Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三和神社 |画像 = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪726 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=三和神社}} |祭神 = [[大物主|大物主命]] |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]（小）
旧[[近代社格制度#諸社|郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]]銅板葺 |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[10月30日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=三和神社|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''三和神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]]三輪にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[郷社]]『栃木県神社誌』，898頁。 == 祭神 == * [[大物主|大物主命]]。 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]12年（[[604年]]）に[[大和国]]（現在の[[奈良県]]）の[[大神神社]]から勧請して創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に掲載されている[[下野国]]那須郡「三和神社」に比定される『栃木県神社誌』，41頁。 [[藤原資家]]（須藤権守貞信）が賊を征伐する際に戦勝を祈願したとされる『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁。資家は[[天養]]元年（[[1144年]]）に社殿を造営し以後資家の子孫の那須氏によって那須氏が除封されるまで守られ続けてきた。那須氏除封後は氏子により維持されている。 当社で行われる三和天祭りは[[平成]]6年（[[1994年]]）に町指定[[民俗文化財|無形民俗文化財]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}。 == 境内 == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|本殿 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|参道 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|鳥居 File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|三輪郷倉 == 文化財 == === 那珂川町指定文化財 === * 無形民俗文化財 ** 三和天祭り - 1994年（平成6年）7月14日指定。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『栃木県神社誌』、栃木県神社庁、2006年 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』、[[山川出版社]]、2006年 ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:那珂川町の建築物]] [[Category:那珂川町の歴史]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

{{infobox shinto shrine |name = Miwa Shrine |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|ja|神道|qq=draft}} |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft}} Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft}} |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|qq=draft}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft}}, and its former shrine Ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|qq=draft}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft}} ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|qq=draft}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|qq=draft}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社|qq=draft}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国|qq=draft}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|qq=draft}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|qq=draft}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gosha of Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]]

In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|qq=draft}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gosha of Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]]

{{infobox shinto shrine |name = Miwa Shrine |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|ja|神道|qq=draft}} |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft}} Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft}} |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|qq=draft}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|qq=draft}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft}}, and its former shrine Ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|qq=draft}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft}} ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|qq=draft}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|qq=draft}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社|qq=draft}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国|qq=draft}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|qq=draft}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|qq=draft}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gosha of Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]]

{{infobox shinto shrine |name = Miwa Shrine |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|ja|神道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tochigi Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu District|qq=}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Town|qq=}} Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Shrine Listing|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|qq=}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|qq=}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/604|qq=}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 30|qq=}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tochigi Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu District|qq=}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Town|qq=}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrine|qq=}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}, and its former shrine Ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Modern Shrine Ranking System|13=User:Immanuelle/Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|qq=}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|qq=}} ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/604|qq=}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Province|qq=}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara Prefecture|qq=}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmi Shrine|qq=}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimotsuke Province|qq=}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Sukeya|qq=}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenyō|qq=}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1144|qq=}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heisei|qq=}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamakawa Publishing|qq=}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]] [[Category:Orphaned pages as of May 10, 2025]]

Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Sukeya|qq=}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenyō|qq=}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1144|qq=}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heisei|qq=}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamakawa Publishing|qq=}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Orphaned translated pages]] {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:11-January 4 (Old Calendar)-11]] [[Category:Translated Shrines and Temples]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]]

Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|qq=}} |foundation = {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|qq=}} 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/604|qq=}}) |main_hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=}} with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 30|qq=}} |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tochigi Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Nasu District|ja|那須郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasu District|qq=}}{{ill|Nakagawa Town|ja|那珂川町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakagawa Town|qq=}} Miwa-based {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrine|qq=}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}, and its former shrine Ranking according to the {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Old Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Modern Shrine Ranking System|13=User:Immanuelle/Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=}} was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|qq=}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大物主命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|ja|推古天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|qq=}} ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/604|qq=}}) after being enshrined from {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国|qq=大和国|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Province|qq=}} (present-day {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara Prefecture|qq=}}) {{ill|Ōmi Shrine|ja|大神神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmi Shrine|qq=}}, and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimotsuke Province|qq=}} as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Sukeya|qq=}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenyō|qq=}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1144|qq=}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} in the 6th year of {{ill|Heisei|ja|平成|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heisei|qq=}} ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamakawa Publishing|qq=}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Orphaned translated pages]] {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:New Pages Likely Untranslated]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]]

In the first year of {{ill|Tenyō|ja|天養|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenyō|qq=}} ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1144|qq=}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} in the 6th year of [[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]] ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamakawa Publishing|qq=}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Orphaned translated pages]] {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]] [[Category:Miwa shrines]]

{{infobox shinto shrine |name = Miwa Shrine |image = [[File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), haiden-1.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]] |location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nakagawa, Tochigi|Nakagawa Town]] Miwa 726 |coordinates = {{coordinates|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Miwa Shrine}} |deity = [[:en:Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto]] |type = {{ill|Engishiki Shrine Listing|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Shrine Listing|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} (small)
Former {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|qq=}} |foundation = [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 12th year ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/604|qq=}}) |main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] with copper plate roof |alias = |enshrinement = |festival = [[:en:October 30|October 30]] |rituals = |location_map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Miwa Shrine|caption=|coordinates={{coord2|36|45|35|N|140|6|43|E|}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (三和神社) is a [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nakagawa, Tochigi|Nakagawa Town]] Miwa-based [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}, and its former shrine Ranking according to the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Old Shrine Rank]] was that of a {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|qq=}}『栃木県神社誌』，898頁. == deity == * [[:en:Ōmononushi|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto]] == History == According to the shrine legend, the shrine was founded in the 12th year of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] ({{ill|604|ja|604|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/604|qq=}}) after being enshrined from [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]] (present-day [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) [[:en:Ōmiwa Shrine|Ōmi Shrine]], and is identified with the Miwa Shrine of Nasu District in [[:en:Shimotsuke Province|Shimotsuke Province]] as listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}『栃木県神社誌』，41頁. {{ill|Fujiwara no Sukeya|ja|藤原資家|lt=Sudo Gon-no-mori Sadamune|lt_ja=須藤権守貞信|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Sukeya|qq=}} is said to have prayed for victory when suppressing bandits『栃木県の歴史散歩』，68頁. In the first year of [[:en:Ten'yō|Tenyō]] ({{ill|1144|ja|1144|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1144|qq=}}), he constructed the shrine’s buildings, and thereafter it was preserved by his descendants, the Nasu clan, until the clan was deposed. After their removal, the shrine has been maintained by its parishioners. The Miwa Ten Festival held at this shrine was designated as a town-designated {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} in the 6th year of [[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]] ({{ill|1994|ja|1994|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1994|qq=}}){{Cite web|和書|author=那珂川町|url=https://www.town.tochigi-nakagawa.lg.jp/22kankou/category/jinjya/2009-1217-1720-52.html|title=町指定文化財（民俗文化財）|language=日本語|accessdate=2012-08-30|url-status=|url-status-date=}}. == Shrine Grounds == File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), honden.jpg|Main Hall File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), sandou.jpg|Approach File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), torii.jpg|Torii File:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi), goukura.jpg|Miwa Gokura == Cultural Properties == === Nakagawa Town-Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Folk Cultural Property|ja|民俗文化財|lt=Intangible Folk Cultural Property|lt_ja=無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} '''Miwa Ten Festival''' - designated on July 14, 1994 (Heisei 6). == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『栃木県神社誌』, Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Administration, 2006 * 『栃木県の歴史散歩』, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamakawa Publishing|qq=}}, 2006, ISBN 978-4-634-24609-6 == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} {{Shinto Nav}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Orphaned translated pages]] {{translated page|ja|三和神社|version=101558556|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:History of Nakagawa Town]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Miwa Shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Miwa-jinja (Nakagawa, Tochigi)]] [[ja:三和神社]] [[Category:Miwa shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]]
